Surname.jp: 不眠症のちびシスター

description.en: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>7%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>7%</color>回復する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>7%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使生命值最低的友军恢复<color=#28d9ed>7%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>。

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> all allies by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> and reduces the duration of debuffs by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>回復させ、弱体効果の持続ターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>만큼 회복시키고, 약화 효과의 지속 시간을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军恢复<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>,并使弱化效果持续时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> to surviving allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, then <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects (Greater)</color> all slain allies. Afterward, <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> all allies by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.
description.jp: 戦場にいる味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせた後、倒れた味方全体を<color=#28d9ed>復活(強化)</color>させる。その後、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>回復させる。
description.kr: 생존한 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킨 후, 사망한 아군 전체를 <color=#28d9ed>부활(강화)</color>시킵니다. 이후 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: 使存活的友军<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>后,使死亡的友军全部<color=#28d9ed>复活(强化)</color>。随后使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen hit by a Critical, decreases the <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of a random enemy by 50% for 1 turn. (Cannot be dispelled)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n会心を受けた時、1ターンの間、ランダムな敵1体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を50%減少。(解除不可)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n치명 피격 시 1턴 동안 무작위 적 1명의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 50% 감소시킵니다.(해제 불가)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n受到致命打击时,使随机1名敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低50%,持续1回合。(不可解除)

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, your Priority increases by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>増加する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 종료 시 자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,自身行动值+<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
